sql.i: select rowguid,goodsname,shopguid,shopname,goodsname,goodstype,typename,lowprice,sendtype,sendname,fmurl,sellnum,sellstatus,addtime,remark from mall_goods where rowguid={rowguid}
select count(1) from mall_goods_article where goodsguid={goodsguid}
update mall_goods_article set content={content} where goodsguid={goodsguid}
update mall_goods set fmurl={fmurl} where rowguid={goodsguid}
select fmurl from mall_goods where rowguid={rowguid}

select rowguid,shopguid,goodsname,typename,lowprice,sendname,sendfrom,fmurl,sellnum,sellstatus,addtime,remark from mall_goods where shopguid={shopguid} and $like(goodsname,goodsname) order by addtime desc
select count(1) from mall_goods where shopguid={shopguid} and $like(goodsname,goodsname)

select rowguid,shopguid,goodsname,typename,lowprice,sendname,sendfrom,fmurl,sellnum,sellstatus,addtime,remark from mall_goods where shopguid={shopguid} and $like(goodsname,goodsname) and sellstatus='1' order by addtime desc
select count(1) from mall_goods where shopguid={shopguid} and $like(goodsname,goodsname) and sellstatus='1'
delete from mall_goods_article where goodsguid={goodsguid}
update mall_goods_ggxh set isdelete='1' where goodsguid={goodsguid}
select fmguid from mall_goods where rowguid={goodsguid}
delete from mall_goods where rowguid={goodsguid}
select rowguid,shopguid,shopname,goodsname,goodstype,typename,lowprice,sendtype,sendname,sendfrom,fmurl,sellnum,sellstatus,addtime,remark from mall_goods where rowguid={rowguid}
update mall_goods set fmguid='',fmurl='' where fmguid={fmguid}
select rowguid,goodsguid,ggxhname,sellprice,goodskc,picurl from mall_goods_ggxh where goodsguid={goodsguid}
select rowguid,goodsguid,ggxhname,sellprice,goodskc,picurl from mall_goods_ggxh where goodsguid={goodsguid}
delete from mall_goods_ggxh where goodsguid={goodsguid}
select rowguid,goodsguid,content from mall_goods_article where goodsguid={goodsguid}
select count(1) from mall_goods_article where goodsguid={goodsguid}
select count(1) from mall_goods_ggxh where rowguid={rowguid}
select rowguid,goodsguid,ggxhname,sellprice,goodskc,picurl from mall_goods_ggxh where rowguid={ggxhsguid}
select rowguid,shopguid,shopname,goodsname,goodstype,typename,lowprice,sendtype,sendname,sendfrom,fmurl,sellnum,sellstatus,addtime,remark from mall_goods where rowguid={goodsguid}
select rowguid,userguid,goodsguid,goodsname,ggxhguid,ggxhname,shopguid,shopname,buynum,buyprice,totalje,addtime,picurl from mall_cartinfo where userguid={userguid} order by addtime desc
select count(1) from mall_cartinfo where userguid={userguid} order by addtime desc
